name: Tokenformer (Pattention) — first-class attempt
author: Alex Wu
notes: v1 Pattention drop-in for dense MLP fc/proj only (attention layers unchanged). Submission is the matched-params Pattention run; the comparison entry is the apples-to-apples dense baseline at matched parameter count. Headline finding: at matched params (~17M), Pattention shrinks the int8+zlib model artifact by ~40% (9.58MB vs 15.86MB) at the cost of +0.147 BPB val. Filed as non-record: the contribution is the compression characterization, not a leaderboard-position improvement. See README.md for full analysis. A supplementary scale-up pilot (MLP_MULT=4, 26.5M params, 11.36MB compressed, val_bpb 1.3746) is preserved at logs_8xh100/run3_pat_mlp4.log but is not part of the head-to-head comparison.
